name: Triage logs, then brief the incident
description: Two-step incident starter: extract errors/warnings from a log blob via ollama_triage_logs, then synthesize a structured operator brief via ollama_incident_brief from the same log. Single input (log_text); callers who want source files or a corpus should use a richer skill variant.

input_shape.log_text: Raw log text from CI, stderr, or a service.

promotion_history.reason: Phase 2 lifecycle proof — 2/4 runs green after bugfix (cold-load timeout + fragile source_paths) were correctly attributed, not skill bugs.
